The Pride of an Address

Badya A city of new worlds

Badya A city of new worlds

Badya marks the largest Palm Hills Developments venture, spreading over 3000 acres. The city is considered Egypt’s first sustainable and smart city that is located in the heart of new 6th of October, strategically connecting East and West Cairo.

Hacienda Heneish

Palm Hills One

One Legacy, Newly Written

New Capital

West Cairo

The Crown Extension

In the heart of the hill

About Palm Hills

About Palm Hills

Palm Hills Developments is Egypt’s leading real estate developer, primarily focused on integrated residential, commercial real estate as well as resort projects. We strive to create self-sufficient, diverse communities, offering unmatched spaces and facilities that cater to all needs, with a diversified portfolio of projects spanning across East & West Cairo, Alexandria, the North Coast & Red Sea.

Global Awards

Explore Hills Today

10 June, 2026

Hacienda Ras El Hekma Private Viewing

On June 10, Palm Hills hosted an exclusive private viewing of Hacienda Ras El Hekma at the residence of Palm Hills Chairman and Group CEO, Yasseen Mansour. Bringing together business leaders, celebrities, and distinguished guests, the evening introduced a landmark collaboration between Palm Hills and Miran Hills and offered a first look at an exceptional coastal living in Ras El Hekma.
